rulings.Case Title: ZOILA ACOSTA MURCIA ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday , June 10, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFFS ZOILA MURCIA and MARLYN MURCIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication DENIED in part and off calendar in part. a) Motion is off calendar as to Bank of America/Recontrust. Notice of settlement filed. b) Motion is denied as to Nationstar/Deutsche. Plaintiffs' Motion for Summary Judgement is DENIED is it does not dispose of all causes of action. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED as Plaintiffs failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZOILA ACOSTA MURCIA ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of The Issues; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday , June 10, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC and HSBC DEUTCHE BANK N.A. AS TRUSTEE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of The Issues DENIED. Each issued to be summarily adjudicated is based on the same facts 1-19. Triable issues of fact as to the Facts 6 and 19. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK LEUNG VS. GANG LUN WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday , June 10, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT GANG WONG, SIU WONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges declaratory and injunctive relief. Defendant is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. (Defendant failed to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint). = (501/REQ)
